response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ (through National Instruments), geospatial systems (GISCollective), and distributed systems (Dunnhumby). However, his primary focus has been on Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang, with limited recent C++ or Rust experience. His geospatial work is relevant but not centered on routing or navigation systems. His adaptability and problem-solving skills are strong, but the direct fit to the role's technical stack and domain is moderate.
strengths: Strong background in C++ from National Instruments role
Extensive experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective)
Proven ability to work across full technical stacks and learn new technologies quickly
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ or Rust (primary requirement)
Geospatial work focused on data collection, not routing/navigation systems
No direct experience with distributed systems at the scale required for global routing pipelines
